profile.name: Dr. Dan Burisch
roles: Chief Scientist, Eagles Disobey Research Consortium
profile.summary: Microbiologist who claims to have served as a senior operative under Majestic-12 from 1986 to 2007, conducting biological research on extraterrestrial entities at S-4 (Papoose Lake) and leading multiple classified sub-projects under Project Aquarius. Formally authorized to speak publicly in 2005 following Majestic-12's adjournment.
early_life: Worked with Los Angeles Microscopical Society as a child
Mentored under chief pathologist at Long Beach Memorial at age 8
Studied under Dr. John Bunyan in England; hypochlorite research recognized in medical literature
Allegedly abducted by P-45s and J-Rod entity in early 1970s
Inducted into Majestic-12 in 1986 while a UNLV student
Completed Ph.D. in microbiology (initially under the name 'Dr. Dan Crain')

key_events.event: Inducted into Majestic-12 by Committee of the Majority
Deployed during Gulf War to counter unauthorized biological warfare
Assigned to S-4 as Microbiologist V; led J-Rod research under Project Aquarius
Received ~30 minutes of continuous telepathic information transfer from Chi'el'ah; remained comatose for days
Co-authored Eagles Disobey: The Case for Inca City, Mars with Marcia McDowell
Committee of the Majority ordered book suppressed; Burisch refused; Ph.D. nullified; near-fatal heart attack
Underwent neurochemical memory reconditioning; relocated to Mississippi
Exchanged timeline data with Chi'el'ah; began documenting Lotus project
Aided Chi'el'ah's return home via Stargate; Marcia McDowell inducted into Majestic
Appointed MJ-9 pro-tem and H-1-Maj (disclosure officer); Majestic-12 formally adjourned October 12
Completed final disclosure orders; retired from service
Brief classified 'National Security' project, reportedly involving Looking Glass
Lectured at Caltech's Beckman Auditorium on the Lotus project
90-minute phone call with researcher Brian Jackson; hoped to advance Lotus toward peer review

entity.name: Chi'el'ah

origin.home: Reticulum (Gliese star system, ~15 light-years from Earth)
origin.crash_cause: Gravimetric navigation failure during descent; one crew member died

physical.posture: Hunched, praying mantis-like due to neuropathy
physical.head: Disproportionately large relative to torso; brain ~1800 cc (vs. human 1350–1400 cc)
physical.eyes: Large, black, bulbous; no visible whites
physical.ears: Small structures with superior hearing capacity
physical.skin: Dark brown/ruddy, reticulated lizard-like texture but smooth to touch; highly elastic and hard from solar exposure
physical.skin_secretion: Exuded glycoprotein-like material through skin pores
physical.limbs: Long arms; four thin, sinuous fingers; four toes with prominent heel knob
physical.organ: Single compartmentalized pear-shaped organ functioning as heart, lungs, and stomach
physical.chromosomes: 19 pairs (vs. human 23) resulting from Robertsonian translocations
physical.density: Less dense than humans; greater cellular hydration ('more liquid-like')

medical_conditions: Cockayne-like syndrome contributing to hunched posture
Reduced antifreeze-type glycoproteins causing body heat loss
entity.communication: Primarily telepathic; able to 'entrain' with humans. Burisch reported feeling the entity's pain during procedures.
entity.age: 622 Earth years old at time of S-4 interaction
entity.name_meaning: 'Hala' = bread gift (from mother); 'el' = prophet of God; numerological value 33 (Metatron Cube / number 9)

containment.facility: Los Alamos National Labs, then S-4 Papoose Lake
containment.notes: Considered himself a captive; desired human-like amenities; kept unclothed against his preference

mission: Originally intended to land at Los Alamos for diplomatic/scientific exchange
Sought human assistance treating neural degeneration in J-Rod lineage
Offered back-engineering of craft in exchange for medical cooperation
Aimed to rectify errors in past genetic manipulation of human ancestors
Believed present-day humans possessed a unique quality enabling contact with 'root genesis'
Desired recovery of 'something lost' - possibly spiritual or genetic continuity
entity.connection_to_burisch: Recognized Burisch from his 1970s abduction; demanded his direct involvement in S-4 research. Relationship evolved into mutual trust; Burisch aided his return via Stargate in 2003.

facility.name: S-4 / Papoose Lake Facility
facility.location: ~12 miles southwest of Area 51 (Groom Lake), Nevada; Papoose Lake area
facility.construction: Built into Papoose Mountain; multiple underground levels
security: Optical scans and voice print identification required
Personnel showered, weighed, shaved, decontaminated on entry/exit
Blue and red floor lines dictating movement; shoot-to-kill for crossing red lines
Elevator buttons concealed; guards controlled floor access without revealing destination
Weight screening conducted in separate hidden location

levels.notes: At least 5 working levels; Ambassadorial Suite Level (ASL) at lowest operational floor

notable_equipment.name: The Clean Sphere
notable_equipment.description: ~52 feet wide, 26 feet tall hyperbaric containment chamber
notable_equipment.location: ASL level; raised/lowered by advanced scissor lift
notable_equipment.purpose: Designed to slow J-Rod neuropathy progression
notable_equipment.access: Required Total Encapsulating Suits (TES) for human occupancy

notable_equipment.name: Looking Glass Device
notable_equipment.description: Reverse-engineered from ancient Sumerian cylinder seals; artificial gravity wave generator
notable_equipment.operation: Operated in pairs (one at S-4, one elsewhere on Nevada Test Site)
notable_equipment.function: Opened a window into quantum probabilities, allowing observation of alternate timeline events
notable_equipment.use: Used by international leadership to analyze probable future outcomes; components distributed to EU, UN, NATO

projects.name: Project Aquarius
projects.purpose: Umbrella project to accumulate data on extraterrestrial biological entities (EBEs) and distribute findings to relevant authorities
projects.admin: Initially USAF; later transferred to Navy and NSA cryptology control
projects.documentation: Briefing books titled 'Aquarius', marked DTIC (Defense Technical Information Center)

projects.name: Project Sigma
projects.outcome: Achieved 'positive success' in 1959 with primitive contact

projects.name: Project Galileo
projects.purpose: Study extraterrestrial and future-terrestrial vehicle propulsion systems
projects.notes: Direct predecessor to Bob Lazar's claimed S-4 work

projects.name: Project Sidekick
projects.purpose: Develop beam weapons based on alien craft technology

projects.name: Project Looking Glass
projects.purpose: Artificial gravity wave physics and temporal probability observation
projects.function: Showed probable future event outcomes; back-engineered from ancient cylinder seals
projects.distribution: Components distributed to EU, UN, NATO
projects.related_object: Orion Cube (Yellow Book/Yellow Disc) - 1954 Eisenhower gift from Orion entities; probability projection influenced by human emotions

projects.name: Project Lotus
projects.purpose: Silicate-associated biological phenomenon research; origins of life investigation
projects.location: Frenchman Mountain, Nevada; Cabrillo Bay, Los Angeles
discoveries: Ancient viral seeding hypothesis for genesis of life
projects.outcome: Burisch lectured findings at Caltech's Beckman Auditorium (2008)

projects.name: Project Preserve Destiny
projects.purpose: Population preparation for anticipated 2012 cataclysmic events

projects.name: Project Preserve Mother
projects.purpose: Ganesh particle deployment for ecosystem remediation

projects.name: Raindancer
projects.purpose: Chemtrail-related aerosolized inoculation using Ganesh particles for bioremediation
projects.notes: Compartmentalized; Burisch had limited direct involvement

documents.significance: Primary scientific record of J-Rod biological tissue sampling, neuropathy analysis, and extraterrestrial biology findings from S-4 Clean Sphere work
documents.leak_history: Second draft smuggled out by a source identified as 'Steven' in late 1998; leaked publicly by B.J. Wolf in 1999 and first publicly analyzed by Bill Hamilton

documents.significance: Correspondence corroborating aspects of Burisch's claimed credentials and black-program involvement

Journalist Michael Schellenberger submitted documentation to the House Oversight Committee UAP hearing in which Burisch's name appears 9 times. The submission is connected to the Immaculate Constellation leaked documentation. Corroborating witness Henry Deacon is also cited within the submission.

documents.designation: Eagles Disobey: The Case for Inca City, Mars
documents.significance: Published analysis of NASA imagery anomalies in Martian 'Inca City' region; ordered suppressed by Committee of the Majority; Burisch refused suppression, leading to credential revocation
Multiple sworn, notarized statements from individuals confirming Burisch's work and credentials

timeline.event: Alleged abduction by P-45s and J-Rod entity; Chi'el'ah recognizes Burisch from this encounter
Inducted into Majestic-12 while UNLV student; assigned to Committee of the Majority as microbiologist
Deployed during Gulf War to counter unauthorized biological warfare use
Assigned to S-4 Papoose Lake as Microbiologist V; begins J-Rod research under Project Aquarius
Receives ~30-minute continuous telepathic information download from Chi'el'ah after protocol breach; remains comatose for days
Co-authors Q-94-109A biological report with supervisor Steven M.
Discovers anomalies in NASA imagery of Martian 'Inca City'; co-authors Eagles Disobey with Marcia McDowell
Eagles Disobey published; Committee of the Majority orders halt; Burisch refuses; Ph.D. nullified; near-fatal heart attack
Undergoes neurochemical memory reconditioning; relocated to Mississippi; mind rejects programming; returned to Las Vegas
Exchanges time travel and timeline data with Chi'el'ah; begins documenting Lotus project
Aids Chi'el'ah's return home via Stargate portal; Marcia McDowell inducted into Majestic
Appointed MJ-9 pro-tem and H-1-Maj (disclosure officer) within Majestic-12
Majestic-12 formally adjourned; Burisch issued final orders to speak publicly
Completes final public disclosure orders; retires from Majestic service
Brief classified 'National Security' project involving Looking Glass technology
Lectures at Caltech Beckman Auditorium on Project Lotus findings
Provides public updates on Timeline 1, variant 83
Researcher Brian Jackson begins 13-year investigation into Burisch claims
90-minute phone call with Brian Jackson; expresses hope to advance Lotus toward peer review
Journalist Michael Schellenberger submits documentation to House Oversight Committee UAP hearing citing Burisch's name 9 times; submission connected to Immaculate Constellation leaked records

mj12.name: Richard Myers
roles: Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff

mj12.name: Sir Kevin Tebbit
roles: UK Secretary of State for Defense
First Secretary to UK's NATO delegation

mj12.name: Carole Thatcher
mj12.notes: 'Seat 9 is reserved for a distinguished member of the public'

mj12.name: Undisclosed
mj12.notes: Identity not revealed in source material

testimonies.real_identity: Unknown; former Army and CIA UFO Analyst
key_claims: Visited S-4 facility at Papoose Lake in August 1958 with five CIA agents
Observed 7 craft in the S-4 hangars
Witnessed a living extraterrestrial entity ('Gray') being held at the location
Delivered 'deathbed confession' video testimony at 2013 Citizens Hearing on Disclosure, Washington D.C.
testimonies.burisch_connection: Kewper's 1958 S-4 account predates Burisch's 1993 deployment by 35 years, independently placing a living extraterrestrial at Papoose Lake and corroborating the operational timeline back to the Eisenhower era
testimonies.notes: Minor description inconsistency between June 1998 and September 1998 accounts of entity clothing

testimonies.background: Senior advisor to four US presidents; held Q-clearance; present during Cuban Missile Crisis
key_claims: Publicly stated: 'Your name gets written in all the important books of talent - not only CIA, but you know, all the Majestic'
First high-level official to publicly acknowledge Majestic-12 as an active talent identification program
Eventually handled physical UFO debris at Los Alamos
testimonies.burisch_connection: Confirms Majestic-12 actively identified and recruited exceptional young scientists - matching the mechanism by which Burisch was purportedly recruited

testimonies.background: US Air Force Staff Sergeant; Electronic Intelligence (ELINT) Analyst; NSA operative
key_claims: Covertly inducted into 'Project Preserve Destiny' (PPD) - a classified black operation
Trained as an 'intuitive communicator' with direct alien interaction protocols
Claims his mother underwent covert genetic experimentation during pregnancy to enhance psychic potential
testimonies.burisch_connection: Both Sherman and Burisch report being guided by government handlers from childhood into classified military programs; parallels in recruitment methodology and program structure

testimonies.background: ~40 years in classified military-industrial roles; waived unacknowledged special access programs (WUSAPs)
key_claims: Built operational gravitational wave generator in BAE lab under $3 million budget
Identified Vice Admiral John McConnell as UFO secrets gatekeeper and MJ1
Worked in electrical systems, microelectronics, pulse power, and antigravity experimentation
testimonies.burisch_connection: Independently corroborates Burisch's stated close relationship with McConnell and McConnell's role as the primary Majestic authority figure

supporting.claim: Supporters possess photographs showing Burisch with full hair in 1990, corroborating aspects of timeline; framed Ph.D. degree received by parents
Channel 8 referred to him as 'Dr. Crain' in broadcasts; NASA allegedly accepted his biological experiment proposal for Mars missions; awarded 'Straight from the Hart Award' on television
Multiple individuals willing to provide sworn, notarized affidavits confirming his work; Dr. Michael Salla publicly affirmed Burisch's authenticity
Early mentorship under chief pathologist at Long Beach Memorial; work with Dr. John Bunyan on hypochlorite research referenced in medical literature
Reportedly refused to participate in unethical cancer drug research, demonstrating professional integrity over financial gain

against.claim: George Knapp's article identified alleged fabricated details in Burisch's early biographical narrative
Bankruptcy filing cited by critics as undermining credibility and suggesting financial instability
Conflict with UNLV biology professors over research direction; transfer to psychology department under disputed circumstances
Ph.D. from SUNY allegedly disappeared or was removed; limited independent verification of claimed credentials
Claims about hypochlorite research lack independent peer-reviewed documentation; scientific work described as misunderstood rather than verified by skeptics

concepts.name: Doctrine of Convergent Timeline Paradox (DCTP)
concepts.summary: Theoretical framework proposing that time-traveling entities do not erase their origin timeline but instead converge or superimpose with the present reality, creating a 'chimera' blended state.
mechanics: Reality operates as a 'multi-wave time stream' with multiple causality paths as simultaneous overlays
Individual consciousness or energy potentially influences which temporal path one aligns with
Different realities can phase in/out or exist as facets of a larger structure (gemstone analogy)
Natural 'semi-quiescent convergence' occurs when timelines interact
key_claims: J-Rod entities from ~52,000 years in humanity's future traveled backward to prevent catastrophe
Anticipated disaster centered on 2012 timeframe: pole shifts, solar disruption, 4+ billion casualties
Moon and Mars ruins are allegedly future cities not yet built in linear timeline
Post-2012, converged timelines expected to naturally separate and diverge
factions: Non-Rogue J-Rods: cooperated with Majestic/humans to avert catastrophe
Rogue J-Rods: self-interested, opposed disclosure, deployed human hybrids as timeline enforcement agents
concepts.outcome: The 2012 catastrophe did not occur, which proponents interpret as evidence the prevention efforts succeeded

concepts.name: Phenotypic Evolution Theory
concepts.summary: Burisch's framework proposing that present-day humans will evolve into J-Rod morphology over ~52,000 years through a combination of environmental pressures, genetic intervention, and punctuated evolutionary change.
framework: Cites Stephen Jay Gould's punctuated equilibrium - evolution occurs in rapid phases under selective pressure
Low-light underground/off-world environments drove selection for enlarged eyes
Chronic skeletal conditions (Cockayne Syndrome-like) caused structural adaptations
Organ modifications including simplified respiratory/digestive function for energy efficiency
genetic_component: J-Rods allegedly manipulated ancient human DNA: 'removed a single strand' enabling interbreeding with Neandertolins
Implemented artificial selection through arranged marriages and controlled breeding pools
Used retroviruses and terrestrial papillomavirus for genetic engineering
concepts.implication: The J-Rod neurological degeneration is a consequence of their own ancestors' past genetic interventions - a form of evolutionary blowback

concepts.name: Ganesh Particle
concepts.summary: Silicate-associated biological phenomenon discovered by Burisch during Project Lotus research at Frenchman Mountain, Nevada. Hypothesized to be a primordial life genesis mechanism.
properties: Hypothesized role in ancient viral seeding of life on Earth
Deployed in ecosystem remediation programs (Project Preserve Mother, Raindancer)

associated_people.name: Marcia McDowell
associated_people.role: Co-author, Eagles Disobey Research Consortium Chief
associated_people.relationship: Burisch's closest collaborator and partner throughout his public disclosure period. Co-authored Eagles Disobey: The Case for Inca City, Mars (1997-1998), appeared alongside him in the 2005 debriefing video, was inducted into Majestic-12 in 2003, and has co-presented with Burisch at conferences including the 2009 Zurich Conference.

associated_people.name: Bill Hamilton
associated_people.role: UFO researcher and Burisch's primary early interviewer
associated_people.relationship: Conducted Burisch's first recorded interview in 2002 alongside BJ Wolf, and a second extensive interview in 2004. Hamilton was among the first researchers to document and publicize Burisch's claims about Project Aquarius, J-Rod, and S-4. He also presented his Burisch research at UPARS LA in 2005 and was interviewed by Project Camelot in March 2006 about the case.

associated_people.name: Kerry Cassidy
associated_people.relationship: Conducted the landmark July 2006 interview 'Out from Under Majestic - Dan Burisch Uncensored' in Las Vegas, and co-conducted a follow-up Project Camelot interview in November 2007 alongside Bill Ryan. Cassidy's extended interview sessions were among the most widely circulated of Burisch's public disclosures.

associated_people.name: Bill Ryan
associated_people.relationship: Co-conducted the November 2007 Project Camelot interview with Burisch covering Stargates, Looking Glass, and interdimensional treaties. In 2019, Ryan gave a private discussion in Laughlin, Nevada recounting his meetings with Burisch and detailing timeline research including T1v83 and the 2007 sequestration.

associated_people.name: Brian Jackson
associated_people.role: Primary researcher and creator of Burisch Archive
associated_people.relationship: Spent 13 years investigating the Burisch case, collaborated with researchers and journalists who investigated Burisch's claims, and conducted a 90-minute phone call with Burisch in 2018 in which Burisch expressed hope to advance Lotus research toward peer review. Created burischarchive.com and delivered a public presentation summarizing his findings in San Francisco in early 2025.

associated_people.name: Tom Mack
associated_people.relationship: Issued a 1999 letter confirming Burisch's alleged alien DNA sequencing work at the S-4 facility. The letter, referenced in Burisch's documentation record, is considered one of the few external written corroborations of his classified program involvement.

associated_people.name: Linda Moulton Howe
associated_people.relationship: Introduced Kewper (the anonymous former Army/CIA analyst whose S-4 account partially corroborates Burisch's timeline) to the public in 1998, conducting a three-day recorded interview with him. Her independent investigative work brought several corroborating witnesses to light within the same research community.

associated_people.name: Dr. Roger Leir
associated_people.relationship: Publicly endorsed Burisch after attending his Caltech Beckman Auditorium lecture on March 10, 2008, lending credibility from within the UFO research community to Burisch's Ganesh Particle and Lotus Project research.

disclosures.title: First Interview - Project Aquarius and J-Rod Contact
disclosures.notes: Burisch's first recorded public disclosure. Covered Project Aquarius, initial alien contact, and early accounts of S-4 work. Primary source for the earliest version of his testimony.

disclosures.title: The Dan Burisch Interview
disclosures.notes: Extended follow-up interview covering Site 4, non-human intelligence, Project Looking Glass, and time manipulation. More detailed than the 2002 session.

disclosures.title: The Dan Burisch Debriefing Video
disclosures.notes: Program overview debriefing conducted with McDowell covering the arc of Burisch's involvement with classified programs.

disclosures.title: Out from Under Majestic - Dan Burisch Uncensored
disclosures.notes: Landmark long-form interview filmed in Las Vegas. Covered abduction experience, Majestic-12 operations, extraterrestrial beings, time travel, and Project Lotus. One of the most widely circulated Burisch disclosures.

disclosures.title: Project Camelot Interviews Dan Burisch
disclosures.notes: Second Project Camelot interview. Topics included Stargates, interdimensional treaties, time travel technology, and planetary catastrophe prevention scenarios.

disclosures.title: Dan and Marcia Discuss Canadian Court Case
disclosures.notes: Public discussion between Burisch and McDowell about alleged Majestic surveillance and harassment connected to a Canadian asylum case.

disclosures.title: Disclosure Dialogue
disclosures.notes: Radio appearance covering Area 51, extraterrestrial beings, and the 1973 encounter narrative.

disclosures.title: Silicate Associated Phenomenon - Lotus Project Lecture
disclosures.notes: Academic-format lecture presenting Burisch's Lotus Project / Ganesh Particle research on portal phenomena associated with quartz crystals, plasma, and RNA interference. Endorsed publicly by Dr. Roger Leir following the event.

disclosures.title: Zurich Conference Workshop
disclosures.notes: Workshop co-presented with Marcia McDowell covering belief systems, scientific perspectives, and immune system topics. Also participated in panel discussions on mandatory vaccinations and personal sovereignty.

disclosures.title: Dan Burisch Describes the S-4 Facility
disclosures.notes: Recorded description of the Papoose Lake facility covering its layout, biological warfare research history, and back-engineering of extraterrestrial technology.
